description: Crop + variation-compare together — the worst-case path the in-memory screenshot pipeline touches most. The first step captures and crops an element into a reference; the second captures and crops the same element again and compares it against that reference within maxVariation (buffer capture -> in-memory crop -> decoded-buffer compare -> single write). Headed Chrome only (Windows/macOS), like the other browser-engine capture permutations, so it lands SKIPPED on headless/Linux.
